metadata_oracle_risk.description: Diagnostic upper-bound model that is allowed to see controlled stressor metadata. It should not be treated as deployable risk perception.

structured_progress_risk.description: Deployable structured baseline using task/language hashes, action horizon, and early rollout progress statistics, with hidden stressor metadata removed.

vision_language_risk.blocker: Rerun a subset with --save-images or add an embedding extraction pass before claiming VLM risk results.
vision_language_risk.description: Frozen VLM/image embedding risk ablation. Current rollout JSONL does not contain saved RGB frame paths or embedding vectors, so this variant is explicitly not trained.

vision_language_risk_selective.blocker: Rerun a subset with --save-images or add an embedding extraction pass before claiming VLM risk results.

open_source_stack.lerobot: Planned export/baseline path; not used for the current risk numbers.
open_source_stack.openpi: Primary robot foundation/VLA policy, using pi05_libero.
open_source_stack.vlm_features: Planned frozen image/language embedding ablation; current rollouts did not save embeddings.
open_source_stack.world_model_features: Current structured model uses early transition/progress statistics as a lightweight world-model proxy; learned predictive dynamics are a planned ablation.

supervisor_offline.interpretation: Episodes with calibrated p_failure >= threshold are abstained in this offline coverage analysis.
